name: mdd-pipeline
description: Orquestador MDD asistido por IA: lenguaje natural -> CIM -> PIM -> PSM -> codigo -> Docker

scripts.predev: node scripts/reset-next-cache.mjs && prisma generate && node scripts/ensure-sqlite-db.mjs && prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss
scripts.go: prisma generate && node scripts/ensure-sqlite-db.mjs && prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss && next build && next start
